const test2 = () => 1

  console.log("Hello")
}

const test2 = () => 1

  console.log("Hello")
}

  console.log("Hello")

=== [R3] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/toggleLazyConst.ts ---
// refactor: 4:7-4:12, 6:7-6:12, 8:7-8:12
// @effect-v3

const test1 = 1

const test2 = () => 1

const test3: () => void = () => {
  console.log("Hello")
}
